_comment: Scoring rubric configuration. The scorer agent seeds these dimensions on first run. Edit scorer/db.js seedRubrics() to load from this file, or modify directly in the Scorer UI after first launch.

dimensions.name: Early growth signal
dimensions.prompt: Is there evidence of recent funding, acquisition, or rapid headcount growth at this company?

dimensions.name: Leadership gap
dimensions.prompt: Is there evidence of a missing or recently vacated senior product or operations leadership role?

dimensions.name: No product discipline
dimensions.prompt: Is there evidence that the company lacks structured product management or has an engineering-led culture without product rigour?

dimensions.name: Scale pressure
dimensions.prompt: Is this company under pressure to scale — from investors, competitors, or market conditions?

dimensions.name: Hiring history signal (manual)
dimensions.prompt: Manual input — has this company previously hired senior product or ops leaders from the outside?

dimensions.name: Tech specialisation
dimensions.prompt: Does this firm primarily invest in technology or tech-enabled businesses?

dimensions.name: Market fit
dimensions.prompt: Is this firm active in markets relevant to your target geography and sector?

dimensions.name: Network signal (manual)
dimensions.prompt: Manual input — is there a warm connection or prior contact with this firm?

dimensions.name: Activity recency
dimensions.prompt: Has this firm made investments or portfolio moves in the last 12 months?
